name: Mentor City Park
description: Mentor City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mentor, MN. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: O'Leary Park
description: O'Leary Park is a place to play pickleball in East Grand Forks, MN. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Schuster Park Courts
description: Schuster Park Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crookston, MN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
